channel.title: Comments on: 2011: A New Kind of Forum Software is Born

item.title: By: Gautham
item.dc:creator: Gautham
item.description: bbPress plugin is cool, Will try it out sometime, Thanks
item.content:encoded: bbPress plugin is cool, Will try it out sometime, Thanks

item.title: By: Dennis Barker
item.dc:creator: Dennis Barker
item.description: I am grateful for all of the work that has gone into the plugin version of bbpress. I'm using it on a multisite installation and hope to contribute from my experience - I'm not a coder but i could potentially help out with tutorials and documentation along the way.
item.content:encoded: I am grateful for all of the work that has gone into the plugin version of bbpress. I’m using it on a multisite installation and hope to contribute from my experience – I’m not a coder but i could potentially help out with tutorials and documentation along the way.

item.title: By: LogonRajni
item.dc:creator: LogonRajni
item.description:
In reply to <a href="/2011-a-new-kind-of-forum-software-is-born/#comment-8601">Gautam</a>.
:D - I guess the real Rajni will also be interested to know you :)
item.content:encoded:
In reply to Gautam.

😀 – I guess the real Rajni will also be interested to know you 🙂

item.title: By: Gautam
item.dc:creator: Gautam
item.description:
In reply to <a href="/2011-a-new-kind-of-forum-software-is-born/#comment-8594">LogonRajni</a>.
Haha, thanks. Are you really the real Rajni? :P
item.content:encoded:
In reply to LogonRajni.

Haha, thanks. Are you really the real Rajni? 😛

item.title: By: LogonRajni
item.dc:creator: LogonRajni
item.description:
Great going Gautam. I did see some of your posts in bbpress.org and was wondering that someone has put "a cute boy's" picture and is posting awesome questions and answers but unbelievably its you yourself! Great and inspired. Keep up the good work. Oh btw, I tried my luck with the new bbpress plugin to have the same look and feel of my parent theme (a whole list of them) but couldn't get it to work, so defaulted to the standalone install.
Regards, Rajni
item.content:encoded:
Great going Gautam. I did see some of your posts in bbpress.org and was wondering that someone has put “a cute boy’s” picture and is posting awesome questions and answers but unbelievably its you yourself! Great and inspired. Keep up the good work. Oh btw, I tried my luck with the new bbpress plugin to have the same look and feel of my parent theme (a whole list of them) but couldn’t get it to work, so defaulted to the standalone install.

Regards,
Rajni

item.title: By: sudodotslash
item.dc:creator: sudodotslash
item.description: Great job Gautam!!!! Please can you tell me how to use a full width page on the forum?
item.content:encoded:
Great job Gautam!!!!
Please can you tell me how to use a full width page on the forum?

item.title: By: Gautam
item.dc:creator: Gautam
item.content:encoded:
In reply to Ashish.

Hey Ashish,

  1. That sounds more like plugin territory to me.
  2. Already there.
  3. Already there. 🙂

item.title: By: Ashish
item.dc:creator: Ashish
item.description:
Hey Gautam,
Here is my Wishlist.
1. Restricting access to WP-Admin to any other user except Admin 2. Editing User Profile Page using some template page instead of doing from WordPress Admin. This should also include password changes. 3. User Profile Page should have users number of posting, link to his personal site etc.All the data which can be pulled from WordPress Backend itself.
Regards, Ashish
item.content:encoded:
Hey Gautam,

Here is my Wishlist.

1. Restricting access to WP-Admin to any other user except Admin
2. Editing User Profile Page using some template page instead of doing from WordPress Admin. This should also include password changes.
3. User Profile Page should have users number of posting, link to his personal site etc.All the data which can be pulled from WordPress Backend itself.

Regards,
Ashish

item.title: By: Gautam
item.dc:creator: Gautam
item.description:
In reply to <a href="/2011-a-new-kind-of-forum-software-is-born/#comment-3079">joj</a>.
Yes, you would have to drop the files from <code>/bbp-themes/bbp-twentyten</code> to your template and do a bit of testing and editing to make sure your template looks nice!
item.content:encoded:
In reply to joj.

Yes, you would have to drop the files from /bbp-themes/bbp-twentyten to your template and do a bit of testing and editing to make sure your template looks nice!

item.title: By: joj
item.dc:creator: joj
item.description: Can i use the plugin with my own theme?
item.content:encoded: Can i use the plugin with my own theme?
